title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Law, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Raizo, Nami as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 60 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
